personal.name: Siddhi Gandhi
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & Data Engineer
personal.summary: I am a Computer Science Engineering student passionate about building innovative software solutions and creating meaningful digital experiences. My interests span Full Stack Development, Data Analytics, Data Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and Cyber Security. Through academic projects, internships, and continuous learning, I have developed practical problem-solving skills and enjoy turning ideas into scalable, user-focused applications. I am always eager to learn new technologies, collaborate with diverse teams, and contribute to projects that create real-world impact.

education.institution: D. Y. Patil College of Engineering and Technology, Kolhapur
education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering (AI & ML)

projects.title: Mess Management System
projects.shortDescription: A robust MERN web application with database-driven CRUD operations, automated billing calculations, and secure role-based access control to modernize student meal tracking.
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive, full-stack web application designed to streamline student mess operations. The system automates meal counting, records daily transactions, and generates transparent billing sheets, replacing error-prone manual registers.
problemStatement: Inefficient Manual Registers: Mess staff track attendance on paper log sheets, which are error-prone, tedious, and easy to lose.
Tedious Monthly Billing: Administrative staff spend hours compiling individual student bills and calculating rebates manually at month-end.
Food Waste Accumulation: Kitchen staff cook fixed quantities daily because they lack a reliable channel to track student leaves or meal cancellations.
objectives: Digitize Student Check-Ins: Allow students to schedule or cancel meals using an interactive calendar dashboard.
Automate Billing Routines: Compute monthly invoices and dynamic attendance-based rebate adjustments on the server side.
Role-Based Dashboards: Implement dedicated portals for Students, Kitchen Staff (daily count display), and Administrators (billing sheets).
features: Dynamic meal booking and cancellation scheduling
Role-based authentication for admins, mess staff, and students
Automated monthly bill calculation based on consumed meals
Real-time dashboard displaying active daily meal counts for staff preparation planning
projects.architecture: Features a standard 3-tier client-server structure: a responsive React single-page frontend, a stateless Express.js REST API server handling business logic, and a MongoDB database cluster storing user documents, attendance logs, and transaction ledgers.
improvements: Implement QR-code based instant check-in at the counter
Integrate UPI payment gateways for online bill payments
Send automatic email/WhatsApp alerts for payment reminders

projects.title: AR Based Herbal Garden
projects.shortDescription: An immersive Augmented Reality educational mobile application built with Unity and Vuforia for interactive, 3D botanical marker tracking and medicinal plant visualization.
projects.description: Built an interactive AR application aiming to digitize botanical learning. Users point their mobile camera at botanical markers to render 3D assets of medicinal plants with interactive textual and audio descriptions.
problemStatement: Passive Botanical Learning: Traditional textbook illustrations and flat text descriptions fail to convey the complex 3D structures and growth metrics of medicinal herbs.
Lack of Interactive Materials: Students struggle to retain plant properties and medical uses without engaging visual media.
Physical Access Limits: Students cannot always visit remote or seasonal botanical gardens to study rare herbs in person.
objectives: Marker-Based 3D Tracking: Render interactive 3D digital plant models over physical markers using mobile cameras.
Accessible Education Guides: Display scientific classifications, harvesting guidelines, and medical uses on context-aware cards.
Immersive Gestures: Support 3D scale, rotation, and audio voiceover translations to enhance engagement and accessibility.
features: Marker-based 3D botanical asset rendering with high fidelity
Interactive UI showing scientific names, medicinal properties, and harvesting guidelines
Pinch-to-zoom and 360-degree rotation gestures to inspect plant structures
Audio voiceover describing plants for accessibility
projects.architecture: Built with Unity Engine using C# scripts for animation lifecycle and Vuforia SDK for image targeting and feature point tracking. Deployed as a standalone Android APK.
improvements: Incorporate markerless tracking (ARCore plane detection) to view plants on any surface
Add a 3D growth simulation slider showing the plant from seed to maturity
Incorporate an AI camera model to identify plants in the wild

projects.title: Fresh Pick
projects.shortDescription: A regional agricultural marketplace designed with Node.js and MySQL to connect local farmers directly with urban consumers for fresh, fair-trade produce.
projects.description: Designed a web marketplace connecting regional farmers directly with consumers. It bypasses middlemen to ensure fair pricing for agricultural products while promoting fresh, local sourcing.
problemStatement: Middlemen Exploitation: Local farmers receive low margins while urban buyers pay high prices due to broker commissions.
Lack of Regional Marketplaces: Consumers cannot easily discover nearby farms producing organic crops or fresh dairy.
Complex Listing Workflows: Farmers require a simplified, mobile-friendly interface optimized for rural network connectivity.
objectives: Peer-to-Peer Catalog: Connect local producers directly to urban consumers to ensure fair-trade pricing.
Farmer-Centric Portals: Build straightforward forms for farmers to list crops, update pricing, and catalog inventories.
Location-Aware Search: Allow consumers to browse agricultural produce based on regional proximity.
features: Farmers dashboard to list crops, update quantities, and set pricing
Location-based product search and filter system for consumers
Secure checkout cart flow with receipt generation
Responsive, easy-to-use layouts optimized for rural mobile web networks
projects.architecture: Constructed with HTML/CSS/JS frontend, powered by a Node.js web server. Uses a MySQL relational database to map products to specific farmers, and manage customer orders securely.
improvements: Incorporate SMS-based product updates for farmers without internet connections
Integrate map routes showing logistics and delivery status in real time
Include AI price analysis matching product pricing to market averages

projects.title: Foodie's Heaven
projects.shortDescription: A highly responsive, stylish cafe and restaurant website featuring rich CSS transitions, custom menu filtering, and interactive client-side reservation modules.
projects.description: Developed a front-end restaurant/cafe site characterized by smooth styling and intuitive user paths. It features interactive menus, beautiful imagery galleries, and a client-side booking system.
problemStatement: Static Menu Limitations: Traditional cafes rely on static PDF lists that cannot filter ingredients or update prices dynamically.
Inefficient Table Reservations: Customers face hurdles booking tables without direct web tools or instant form confirmation.
Unresponsive Design: Many food landing pages fail to render menu layouts cleanly across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
objectives: Interactive Menu Discovery: Develop filterable category toggles and smooth CSS hover previews.
Client-Side Booking Form: Implement responsive form modules validating user input instantly.
Aesthetic Visual Layouts: Style elegant typography, custom menu grids, and glassmorphic navigation bars.
features: Visual menu categories with pricing toggles
Interactive, animated gallery of the cafe's interiors
Smooth CSS transitions and responsive grid adjustments for tablets and phones
Client-side verified table booking form
projects.architecture: Static front-end application built with semantic HTML5 markup, layout architecture using Flexbox and Grid, and custom JavaScript handling active menu states and reservations.
improvements: Develop a node/express backend to save reservations to a database
Integrate interactive map APIs showing branch locations
Support online pre-ordering and customized menus

projects.title: Supermarket Transaction Analysis
projects.shortDescription: A Machine Learning and association rule data mining pipeline implementing Apriori and FP-Growth algorithms in Python to extract product correlation insights.
projects.description: Designed a data analysis project implementing machine learning algorithms to study customer shopping records. The model uncovers frequent product combinations, allowing store owners to optimize product placements.
problemStatement: Missed Cross-Selling Trends: Store managers fail to analyze transaction records, leading to suboptimal product shelving layouts.
Scale Obstacles: Raw checkout transaction streams are massive, making correlation analysis using spreadsheets impossible.
Unquantified Buying Cycles: Decisions on discounts or bundled offers are made without solid mathematical metrics like Support or Lift.
objectives: Association Rules Pipeline: Implement Apriori and FP-Growth models to extract meaningful product combinations.
Quantify Correlation Metrics: Calculate mathematical values for Support, Confidence, and Lift across checkout streams.
Data Visualizations: Plot heatmaps and cluster charts showing co-purchase correlation trends.
features: Association rule mining using the Apriori and FP-Growth algorithms
Support, Confidence, and Lift calculations for all transaction items
Data cleaning scripts filtering outlier purchases and missing records
Interactive correlation heatmaps plotting product co-purchase trends
projects.architecture: Python-based Jupyter scripting workflow. Data is processed using Pandas/NumPy, modeled with Mlxtend library, and results are plotted using Matplotlib/Seaborn.
improvements: Build a web-based dashboard using Streamlit to upload transaction logs
Develop a time-series forecasting model predicting monthly demand for items
Implement clustering algorithms (K-Means) to group customers by shopping value

projects.title: Intelligent Resume Analyzer
projects.shortDescription: A Machine Learning & NLP-powered academic project that analyzes resumes, predicts job roles, calculates ATS compatibility scores, detects skill gaps, and recommends certifications.
projects.description: Developed an advanced Machine Learning and NLP system designed to tackle recruitment screening challenges. The application extracts structure and text from PDF resumes, employs NLP models to classify candidate suitability, computes semantic similarity matches against target job descriptions, identifies skill gaps, and provides custom career improvement recommendations.
problemStatement: Slow Manual Screening: Recruiters spend hours on repetitive resume reviews without intelligent prioritization.
Unfair ATS Rejections: Rule-based legacy systems discard strong candidates over minor formatting or keyword gaps.
Zero Feedback: Candidates receive no actionable guidance on how to strengthen their resumes.
Unknown Skill Gaps: There is no systematic way to identify what skills a candidate is missing for a target role.
objectives: Automate Evaluation: Replace manual screening with an intelligent, ML-driven resume analyzer.
Predict Job Roles: Use supervised ML to match resumes to the most suitable job categories.
Calculate ATS Score: Generate a structured, weighted score reflecting resume quality and relevance.
Detect Skill Gaps: Identify missing skills and recommend specific certifications or courses.
features: PDF text extraction and structure scanning using PyPDF2
Keyword extraction and missing keyword highlighting using Gemini Pro models
ATS compliance evaluation (formatting, layout, and language checks)
Automated suggestions for writing bullet points aligned with job requirements
projects.architecture: Python script using Streamlit for an interactive dashboard. The backend processes the uploaded PDF, feeds the text block alongside prompt engineering parameters to the Gemini API, and parses the output JSON.
improvements: Support DOCX formats alongside standard PDFs
Implement bullet point auto-rewriters to match specific skills
Build a dashboard history showing past resumes and score progression

projects.title: AI Resume Builder
projects.shortDescription: A comprehensive MERN stack platform featuring custom templates, AI description auto-fill, and live PDFKit compilation driven by OpenAI API services.
projects.description: Built a comprehensive, AI-powered system that guides job seekers through resume generation, live previewing, cover letter crafting, and score optimization in one unified interface.
problemStatement: Layout Obstacles: Job seekers spend hours alignment-tweaking traditional documents, leading to layout inconsistencies.
Resume Writer Block: Describing professional achievements using active keywords and industry vocabulary is challenging.
Broken PDF Generation: Form-to-file conversions often break visual layout ratios, resulting in messy multiple-page documents.
objectives: WYSIWYG Real-Time Builder: Build an interactive editor showing instantaneous template adjustments.
Generative Writing Assistant: Integrate OpenAI to draft context-aware roles, responsibilities, and cover letters.
High-Fidelity PDF Outputs: Compile perfect PDF byte streams using server-side PDFKit engines.
features: WYSWYG real-time resume template generator
AI text generator auto-filling job roles and responsibilities
ATS score analyzer scanning keywords and structure against job descriptions
Integrated AI cover letter generator matching the resume's tone
projects.architecture: Full-stack MERN setup. The React frontend supports dynamic forms and custom previews. The Express API manages user documents in MongoDB, routes requests to LLM APIs, and compiles clean PDF bytes using PDFKit.
improvements: Integrate LinkedIn scraping to create profiles with one click
Implement custom, professionally designed tailwind layouts
Add mock interview preparation prompts based on the built resume

projects.title: Intelligent Movie Recommendation System
projects.shortDescription: An academic Machine Learning system utilizing content-based and collaborative filtering models to recommend personalized movies based on user profiles and metadata.
projects.description: Designed and developed an academic Movie Recommendation System implementing ML models (Cosine Similarity, KNN, and SVD matrix factorization). The system offers content-based suggestions by scanning movie genres, keywords, and casts, combined with user rating correlations to solve cold-start and recommendation accuracy challenges.
problemStatement: Choice Overload: Users encounter decision fatigue when browsing vast, unstructured streaming catalogs.
Cold-Start Bottlenecks: Basic recommenders fail to suggest matches for new users with zero rating histories.
Ineffective Tag Matching: Standard keyword search algorithms fail to compute deeper thematic correlations between films.
objectives: Hybrid Model Pipeline: Integrate content-based metadata mapping with SVD collaborative filtering calculations.
Minimize Search Delay: Optimize similarity matrix computations to return recommendation arrays under 100ms.
Streamlined Interface: Develop an interactive Streamlit application with adjustable user feedback sliders.
features: Hybrid filtering: Content-based (metadata correlation) + Collaborative (user rating matrix)
Real-time recommendation computation based on active slider scores
Interactive web UI built with Streamlit for dynamic catalog searching
Visualization charts comparing popularity metrics and user rating densities
projects.architecture: Python Streamlit app utilizing Pandas for structured dataset preprocessing. ML models calculate pairwise similarity matrices, with data serialization to run queries with sub-second latency.
improvements: Integrate TMDB API fetches to show updated movie posters and trailers
Deploy deep-learning based Autoencoders for collaborative user-rating matrices
Implement real-time session tracking for guest recommendations

projects.title: Student Management System
projects.shortDescription: A secure, desktop-based administration database system built with Python and MySQL to handle student enrollments, grading database rules, and index optimizations.
projects.description: Developed an academic Student Management System powered by a relational MySQL database. Designed a normalized schema (3NF) to eliminate redundancy, utilizing stored procedures, triggers for automated grade calculation, and indexes for query speedups. Integrated Python Tkinter GUI to enable administrative actions.
problemStatement: Outdated Record Storage: Administrative files stored in paper sheets or flat sheets lead to data corruption.
Anomalous Schema Models: Un-normalized data structures cause insert, update, and delete integrity issues.
Manual GPA Calculations: Staff spend days calculating individual grades and averages at the end of semesters.
objectives: 3NF Normalization: Establish a structured database layout to completely eliminate duplicate information.
Database-Level Automation: Code SQL triggers and procedures to instantly process student GPAs upon grading changes.
Desktop Administration Client: Connect a verified Tkinter GUI to enable secure database query access.
features: Secure administrative login with database-verified credentials
Student CRUD operations: enrollments, updates, grading updates, and fee logging
MySQL Database triggers automating final GPA / grades calculation upon score inserts
Attendance sheets generation and automated warnings for low attendance thresholds
projects.architecture: Desktop client application designed in Python using the Tkinter library for the graphical interface and the mysql-connector-python package to interact securely with a hosted MySQL relational database instance.
improvements: Migrate the Tkinter desktop GUI to a modern React-based web dashboard
Enable multi-role portals (separate dashboards for Students, Faculty, and Admins)
Implement secure PDF grade-report card auto-generation and email dispatch

projects.title: AI Financial Advisor
projects.shortDescription: A sophisticated Streamlit-based AI financial advisory platform powered by Large Language Models to analyze portfolios, assess risk profiles, and provide personalized financial planning insights.
projects.description: Developed an interactive AI Financial Advisor platform using Streamlit and OpenAI/Gemini API. The system conducts personalized risk profile evaluations, analyzes spending patterns, suggests investment strategies, and provides conversational advice on budgeting, tax planning, and retirement goals using LLM prompt-engineering and RAG architectures.
problemStatement: Financial Advice Gap: Millions of retail investors lack access to professional, fee-only financial planners for personalized asset allocation.
Siloed Financial Planning: Tracking expenses, evaluating risk tolerances, and mapping long-term investment goals are often spread across separate, complex tools.
Static General Advice: Existing web calculators offer rigid, generic percentage plans that fail to adapt to a user's unique local tax constraints or changing financial situations.
objectives: AI-Driven Advisory Conversational Agent: Develop an intuitive, natural language interface capable of answering nuanced tax, budgeting, and investment questions.
Dynamic Risk-Based Asset Allocators: Calculate personalized model portfolios across equities, debt, and cash assets based on user risk profiles.
Interactive Financial Visualizations: Build responsive Streamlit graphs charting projected compound interest growths and expense breakdowns.
features: Interactive Risk Profile Questionnaire calculating risk tolerance weights
AI Chatbot advisor offering contextual financial planning, budgeting, and investment suggestions
Compound Interest and Portfolio Growth projection calculators with dynamic sliders
Visual expense breakdown charts and asset allocation recommendations
projects.architecture: Features a Python-based Streamlit single-page frontend. The backend handles interactive inputs, performs calculations using Pandas/NumPy, visualizes trends using Matplotlib/Seaborn, and routes conversation history to the Gemini/OpenAI API using custom context embeddings.
improvements: Integrate Plaid or banking APIs to fetch real-time expense details automatically
Implement a portfolio tracker fetching live stock and mutual fund market prices
Add automated tax-loss harvesting recommendations based on regional tax laws

internships.description: Explored Generative AI concepts, Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, and building semantic reasoning agents using Google Cloud Vertex AI services.
Trained in cloud infrastructure concepts including compute instances (EC2), virtual networks (VPC), secure access controls (IAM), and file storage systems (S3).
Completed experiential learning focused on building secure AWS data pipelines, structuring ETL flows, database integrations, and warehousing configurations.
Acquired hands-on experience in training machine learning models for regression, classification, and clustering using popular Python libraries like TensorFlow and Scikit-Learn.
Developed full-stack database-driven web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Implemented secure user authentication and dashboard functionalities.
